landingTagline: Build a route, follow a plan, or browse every spot in the neighborhood.

commercial-drive.title: Explore Commercial Drive
commercial-drive.pathsIntro: Choose one of the following options and end up with a personalized route to explore the neighborhood.

chinatown.pathsIntro: Choose one of the following options and end up with a personalized route to explore Chinatown, Japantown, and Strathcona on the grid.
